meaning: adj.热心的,积极的,有抱负的
examples: He came from an aspiring working-class background.
Like so many aspiring actresses, she ended up waiting tables and temping in office jobs.
Aspiring host cities are picking up the code.
Therein lies the most important lesson of all to any aspiring restaurateur: success is never foolproof.
Derek Lee is an aspiring actor and filmmaker who owns a beautiful, bright red Mini Cooper.
